name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Studied Computer Science together. She recently started a role as a Senior Dev and we enjoy trail running on weekends.

name: Marcus Chen
bio: My first creative director. He taught me everything about UI/UX. Haven't checked in since his daughter was born.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Grew up on the same street in Madrid. She's visiting next month and we need to finalize the travel itinerary.

name: David Kwomo
bio: Former college basketball teammate. We usually grab coffee to discuss startup ideas and workout routines.

name: Jamie Vough
bio: Met at a jazz festival. Always keeps me updated on local underground gigs and rare vinyl finds.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: A brilliant founder I met at a tech mixer. We trade advice on scaling small businesses and remote work culture.

name: Alex Thompson
bio: Gaming buddy for over 5 years. We're currently collaborating on a small open-source React project.

name: Sophia Lee
bio: Former roommate who moved to Berlin. She’s an incredible street photographer and we shared a flat for 3 years.
